content: "London Falling" by Patrick Radden Keefe is a nonfiction true crime book published April 7, 2026. title: Beyond P(doom): Marc Andreessen - Betting on America
content: Marc Andreessen discusses AI's economic impact with CSIS, arguing its largest effects are still coming. He examines AI's potential to expand expertise access and transform sectors like healthcare, education, law, and software. He identifies institutional barriers—regulation, policy, and infrastructure—as bigger obstacles than technology itself. The conversation addresses the U.S.-China AI competition, export controls, data centers, energy, reindustrialization, defense technology, and government's innovation role, concluding that America can still lead the next economic growth wave.
source: The a16z Show - content+a16zpodcast@a16z.com (Marc Andreessen, Navin Girishankar)

title: 工作 8 年，这样 while 循环调别人接口是什么水平？
content: A developer discovered a colleague's code that uses an unbounded `while` loop to call a remote RPC interface over 50 times, with each call having a 99th percentile latency of 2 seconds. The function recursively passes returned IDs until a non-positive value terminates the loop. This approach risks significant performance degradation, potential timeouts, and resource exhaustion from the synchronous blocking calls without pagination, batching, or circuit breaker patterns.

title: 老黄：Prompt已死，整个AI圈都在疯狂追Loop
content: Silicon Valley is shifting from prompt engineering to "Loop Engineering," where AI systems autonomously run discovery-execution-validation-persistence-schedule cycles 24/7. Nvidia's Jensen Huang and others declare prompts obsolete; Anthropic reports 80%+ of engineers already use self-improving loops. The approach requires human architects to design goals, verification (independent evaluator agents), and memory persistence, then step back. Risks include validation debt, human cognitive surrender, and runaway token costs. The paradigm treats human judgment as the scarce resource while making code generation nearly free.

title: 合并部门后，公司把一位 10 年+的测试裁了，客服部门的同事说唯一懂她们的测试被裁了
content: After a company merger, a veteran tester with over 10 years of experience was laid off despite being the only team member who truly understood the customer service department's needs. Colleagues noted he was reliable and hardworking but lacked skills in self-promotion, performative productivity, and bureaucratic reporting. His new leadership remained unaware of his value, and no advocates remained to defend him—other supportive voices had already been eliminated. The incident illustrates how quiet competence often goes unrewarded in corporate environments that prioritize visibility over substance.

title: 存储算力日益短缺，谷歌开始探索让旧手机组队做AI服务器了
content: Google and UC San Diego are exploring a distributed computing platform using 2,000 retired Pixel Fold phones as servers. The phones are stripped to motherboards, removing batteries, cases, and cameras to reduce fire risks, then run Linux instead of Android. Connected via wired networking PCB boards, clusters of 25-50 phones provide combined compute power with low energy consumption. While unsuitable for large AI model training, this approach offers cost-effective, low-latency edge computing for localized AI inference and workloads, addressing rising chip shortages and energy demands despite concerns about hardware reliability and maintenance complexity.

The author summarizes Bertrand Russell's "The Conquest of Happiness" in three points: have courage to face reality and act rationally; shift focus from perfecting oneself to external objectives; and accept what cannot be changed. The first point is foundational. Unhappiness often stems from being trapped by desires and obsessions, pursuing unrealistic perfection. title: 账户腰斩后，我立了一条铁律：选股先看ROE，但绝不止看ROE
content: A Chinese investor who lost 60% in the 2008 crash developed a three-tier stock screening system over 21 years. First, ROE serves as the primary filter—set at ≥15% for consumer/healthcare and relative-to-industry benchmarks for heavy-asset sectors—but must be verified with ROA to detect leverage-driven "paper prosperity" and checked for debt levels and non-recurring profits. Second, dividend yield validates that ROE translates to shareholder returns; yields should exceed 10-year government bond rates, with operating cash flow confirming sustainable payouts. Third, four valuation tools determine timing: historical PE levels, dividend yield comparisons, PEG ratios capped at 1.5, and PB as a safety margin—especially for cyclicals where PB <1 signals opportunity. The core insight: quality comes before price; ROE is necessary but insufficient alone.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - KAIZEN投资之道

content: France recorded approximately 1,000 excess deaths over five days starting June 24, with daily fatalities rising 40% above April-May levels; 85% involved people over 65. Paris mortuaries reached capacity, and emergency services confirmed 109 deaths in 24 hours—four times normal levels. The surge coincides with a severe heatwave across Europe. Germany and other European nations also face extreme heat, though most hospitals historically lack air conditioning due to previously rare high temperatures.

Preferred fats are extra virgin olive oil and avocado oil. Coffee and green tea help reduce uric acid; drink plenty of water. Include nuts, seeds, probiotic-rich dairy, and dark chocolate. Avoid sugary drinks, fruit juices, refined grains, animal organs, high-purine seafood, beer, processed meats, artificial sweeteners, and unfermented soy products. Target uric acid level is ≤5.5 mg/dL.

title: 35岁职场人，又好找工作了？
content: AI is reshaping hiring demand: junior roles requiring under one year of experience fell roughly 20%, while AI engineer positions for new graduates surged 39.2%. Employers now prioritize decision-making and risk judgment over execution, benefiting experienced workers who combine domain knowledge with AI proficiency. Companies are shrinking teams while deploying AI agents, cutting headcount by up to 70% in some cases. Success depends on actively adopting AI tools, maintaining adaptability, and avoiding path dependency—age itself is not determinative, but the willingness to integrate AI with expertise is.

China's A-share market shows extreme divergence. While the Shanghai Composite Index rose 46.5% from its September 2024 low to 4,027 points by June 2026, 21.1% of stocks fell below pre-rally levels, 57.7% declined in the past year, and 2,196 stocks dropped over 15%. Meanwhile, 304 stocks surged over 200%. The market features a "killing A" pattern for most stocks, with few booming while the majority remain in prolonged bearish territory.

title: 一场没有退路的豪赌：解码阿里腾讯字节的AI“总攻”路线图
content: China's three largest internet companies—Alibaba, Tencent, and ByteDance—are making unprecedented AI investments to avoid being disrupted by generative AI. Alibaba's CEO Wu Yongming leads the most comprehensive strategy with a four-layer architecture covering chips, cloud infrastructure, open-source models (Qwen), and applications. ByteDance excels in consumer products like Doubao (140 million daily users) and video generation (Seedance) but lags in infrastructure. All three aim to become AI super-entrances, shifting competition from user traffic to task completion rates, though profitability remains distant due to high inference costs.

title: 电池新规来了，7月1日施行
content: China's new EV battery safety standard (GB38031-2025) takes effect July 1, 2026, with a one-year transition period. Key upgrades include extending thermal runaway safety time from 5 minutes to 2 hours without fire or explosion, requiring active thermal blocking capability, mandating physical emergency power cutoff switches, and adding bottom impact and fast-charging cycle tests. Smoke must not harm occupants. Some manufacturers like Xiaomi, XPeng, and BYD have already met standards. Compliance costs are modest (~$100-150 per battery pack), though low-cost models face greater pressure. Full market compliance is expected by July 2027.

title: “创伤文化”如何成为精英阶级的操控工具？社会如何失去谈论贫穷、工资、阶级、剥削、劳动尊严、教育不平等的动力 | 原文
content: Cultural theorist Catherine Liu critiques how "trauma culture" serves as a tool for professional-managerial elites to depoliticize suffering. By framing social problems like poverty, wage exploitation, and educational inequality as individual psychological wounds, this discourse prevents collective organizing around class issues. Liu argues that progressives' emphasis on personal visibility and recognition fragments solidarity, replacing structural analysis with therapeutic language that ultimately protects elite interests while avoiding meaningful engagement with economic injustice.

title: 6月29日凌晨四川宜宾发生 5.5 级地震，这次地震情况如何？原因是什么？
content: A magnitude 5.5 earthquake struck Gaoxian County, Yibin, Sichuan Province, at 12:12 AM on June 29, with a focal depth of 6 kilometers. Local authorities began inspections immediately after the quake and had not received any casualty reports by 1:00 AM. Residents in Gaoxian and neighboring Gongxian counties reported significant furniture displacement during the tremor. The earthquake was also felt in Yibin and Chengdu.
